column1: # Rabits OUI starter dataset — curated, high-confidence prefixes (virtualization, SBC, IoT chips).
# This is intentionally small and accurate. For full coverage, drop the IEEE `oui.csv` or the
# Wireshark `manuf` file next to the binary and point RabitsOptions.OuiFilePath at it; external
# entries are merged and override these.
# Format:  <OUI>\t<Vendor>   (OUI accepts AABBCC, AA:BB:CC or AA-BB-CC)
